AC: 5

WT: 1.0 Size: SMALL

Race: ALL

QuoteReply
# Sep 23 2001 at 2:13 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765258974
183 posts
Put this in secondary and stein in primary! duh unless you get a secondary better than this
▲ Page top
How about a stein or cgs?
QuoteReply
# Aug 29 2001 at 8:22 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592245658174
5 posts
Just out of curiosity, why would somebody spend close to 300pp on this thing? For wis casters, the CGS is far better and not much more depending on the type of deal you get. Stein of Moggok's can be found left and right in standard auction zones for 150-200pp. Both of these things have better stats by far with the exception of AC part on the stein. I know this thing looks a lot nicer than a coffee mug but are looks more important than survivability?
▲ Page top
RE: How about a stein or cgs?
QuoteReply
# Dec 03 2001 at 11:19 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593965767818
49 posts
Yes Looks are more important
▲ Page top
RE: How about a stein or cgs?
QuoteReply
# Feb 06 2002 at 10:53 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249870393
133 posts
Aye.

You Have Become Better At Looking Uber (Maxed)
▲ Page top
RE: How about a stein or cgs?
QuoteReply
# Feb 11 2002 at 12:23 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592758886080
6 posts
I go for the looks :)
▲ Page top
RE: How about a stein or cgs?
QuoteReply
# Feb 15 2004 at 1:10 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1595780881775
1,154 posts
I dont think this looks "cool" at all it looks crappy~

What looks UBAH is 2 "ice cream cones..."

Do you want to know a secret? Alright... I'll tell you one!

Cone of the Mystics in Primary
Shardwurm Eye in Secondary

Total Stats - 5 AC, 10 INT, 5 WIS, 3 DEX, 50 Mana

Pretty Crappy when you get up higher, but do you think that bothers me. On my wizzy I don't even care about stats on most items, Mana is nice, Int is nice, Foci and FT are very nice, but its all pointless. Bind, PoK Gate, C3/C5 for 20pp, Gate.
Got A Drogmor, thats always medding, thats a huge upgrade from just some FT items (medding is 1/10 of your Meditation Skill which is 25m/tick).

Get a cleric to Blessing (Spell haste) you and a Mage to summon a Damage Bracer... there is little point for anything else. Heres the point, until you get real high no stats on a wizzy mean ANYTHING! I could play my Wizzy Naked and he'd be just as good as he is now!

Once you are high, the only reason to have high mana is to be able to burn down things that have a TON of HP, other then that all you need is HP and Resists... When playing a wizzy play for looks and fun!!!
▲ Page top
Sheild
QuoteReply
# Jul 10 2001 at 10:34 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249576088
37 posts
Bought one for 250pp on Saryn Server... beats out my Shiney Brass Sheild. For those who havn't caught it already, it looks like shimmering orb, a pulsing white shield thing... also acts as a major light source... hooray...

# Sep 29 2002 at 4:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591766369448
49 posts
lore doesnt mean it's part of a quest, it means you can only have on on your inventory and/or in your bank at one time
▲ Page top
RE: Quest?
QuoteReply
# Jun 13 2001 at 9:07 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
No, it isn't a quest, they just don't want high levels farming it for about 200 plat each shield.

#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 10 2001 at 9:08 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) who ever posted mage suck in dungeons cant be over lvl 10 or they would realize that mages do awsome in dungeons and can farm damn near anything with earth pet if they do it right and not play like a noobie ;P
Uncommon
QuoteReply
# Jun 05 2001 at 11:15 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
It drops off the moldmaster as well as randomly off all other sporali except for the defenders. Got 7 in one evening... lore though so i let other people loot.
▲ Page top
My 2 cp's
QuoteReply
# Jun 04 2001 at 12:53 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758572152
View User Forum
8 posts
I'm a 21 Mage hunting in Runnyeye and got this gem tonight off a Sporali (those ugly mushroom men) in Runnyeye.

It appears as a shimmering white light on your arm.

I should add, I find Runnyeye terribly difficult to hunt in for a mage. Almost everything aggros on my pet making crowd control impossible.

Safe hunting!
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 06 2001 at 9:23 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Well the reason you are having problems is because ALL mages perform poorly in dungeons. get out in the fresh air, take a cruise to kunark go see lake of ill omen you'll like it their much more i guarantee
RE: My 2 cp's
QuoteReply
# Jun 16 2001 at 2:45 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
As a 29 mage i have not many problems hunting in dungeons. You just need to keep your wits about you and keep a tight rein on your pet. Also its good to use air pets indoors because their invisiblitiy means less aggro!
